summary: Integrated ADR 0201 on top of synchronized repo release 0.177.62 by replaying `make converge-harbor` again after the latest-main Harbor probe regressed to `registry.lv3.org -> nginx.lv3.org` and `127.0.0.1:8095` went dark, preserving the exact-main OIDC readiness recycle and re-verifying registry.lv3.org, Harbor's runtime-local auth surface, and docker-build check-runner pulls end to end on the already-current platform baseline 0.130.45.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest -q tests/test_harbor_runtime_role.py` returned `5 passed`, covering the new Harbor OIDC readiness recycle path that probes `127.0.0.1:8095` before OIDC bootstrap and forces one Harbor recycle when the admin API is unreachable even though Harbor containers still appear present.

After `origin/main` advanced to repo release `0.177.62`, the first Harbor probe failed with `308 Permanent Redirect` to `https://nginx.lv3.org/...` and `127.0.0.1:8095` unavailable on `docker-runtime-lv3`; replaying `make converge-harbor` from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0246-main-push` repaired the latest-main state with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=127 changed=8 failed=0 skipped=20` and `nginx-lv3 : ok=38 changed=3 failed=0 skipped=11`.

verification.check: Public Harbor API and registry auth challenge
verification.observed: `curl -fsS --max-time 20 https://registry.lv3.org/api/v2.0/ping` returned `Pong`, and `curl -skI --max-time 20 https://registry.lv3.org/v2/` returned `HTTP/2 401` with `docker-distribution-api-version: registry/2.0`, `www-authenticate: Bearer realm="https://registry.lv3.org/service/token",service="harbor-registry"`, and request id `724291f0-dcf8-4da7-8e2a-332f26d0a4d5`.

verification.check: Runtime-local Harbor admin API and registry auth challenge
verification.observed: Via the repo-managed SSH ProxyCommand through `ops@100.64.0.1`, `curl -fsS --max-time 20 http://127.0.0.1:8095/api/v2.0/ping` on `docker-runtime-lv3` returned `Pong`, and `curl -sSI --max-time 20 http://127.0.0.1:8095/v2/` returned `HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized` with `Docker-Distribution-Api-Version: registry/2.0` and request id `be09b03a-3bc7-4625-b204-5d83a9e38e70`.

Via the same repo-managed SSH ProxyCommand, `docker pull registry.lv3.org/check-runner/python:3.12.10` on `docker-build-lv3` completed with digest `sha256:9dd2ea22539ed61d0aed774d0f29d2a2de674531b80f852484849500d64169ff`, and `docker image inspect` reported `["registry.lv3.org/check-runner/python@sha256:9dd2ea22539ed61d0aed774d0f29d2a2de674531b80f852484849500d64169ff"]`.

notes: The earlier branch-local receipt remains preserved as the first isolated-worktree Harbor proof, but this mainline receipt is the canonical source for release 0.177.63 after the synchronized latest-main replay repaired the Harbor regression that appeared once ADR 0239 advanced origin/main.

ADR 0201 first became true on platform version 0.130.43; this receipt records the later synchronized latest-main replay that preserves the current platform baseline at 0.130.45 while keeping Harbor healthy on top of the newer mainline repository state.

The integrated release step that follows this receipt updates `VERSION`, `RELEASE.md`, `changelog.md`, `docs/release-notes/*`, `README.md`, `build/platform-manifest.json`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and the ADR and workstream metadata to record Harbor as merged mainline truth on top of release 0.177.62.
